    C

    Child - Class in Project.Commands.Project
    Retrieves the nth child element of a specified parent element.
    Child() - Constructor for class Project.Commands.Project.Child
     
    Children - Class in Project.Commands.Project
    Lists all children of a specified element with their attributes and ids.
    Children() - Constructor for class Project.Commands.Project.Children
     
    Closing - Class in Project.Commands.Basic
    Closes the currently open file and clears the editor context.
    Closing() - Constructor for class Project.Commands.Basic.Closing
     
    Command - Interface in Project.Interfaces
     
    CommandExecution - Class in Project.Commands
    Registry and factory for available command implementations.
    CommandExecution() - Constructor for class Project.Commands.CommandExecution
     
    Context - Class in Project.Commands
    Holds runtime state shared across commands: current element, filename, storage.
    Context(SaveStorage) - Constructor for class Project.Commands.Context
